title: context_emotion promotion_decision
description: Output of evaluation/promotion_gate.py, written by evaluation/compare_candidate.py as promotion_decision.json. This is the only artifact deployment/promote_model.py is allowed to act on - it never re-derives pass/fail itself.

gates.description: Each gate is 'pass' | 'fail' | 'not_configured'. 'not_configured' means the underlying threshold/data source isn't ready yet (see promotion_policy.yaml TODOs) - it is NOT treated as a pass.

final_decision.description: promote: every gate is 'pass'. reject: any required gate is 'fail'. manual_review: no 'fail', but at least one required gate is 'not_configured' (or an optional gate failed) - see promotion_gate.py for the exact rule.

reasons.description: Human-readable explanation per gate, always non-empty even on promote (e.g. 'overall_quality: pass - macro_f1 0.71 >= current 0.68').
